title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: We discovered an old map in the attic.
example.secondSentence: We (1) _________ an old map in the attic.

questions.firstSentence: A cleaner cleans the office every day.
This is the most interesting book I have ever read.
questions.secondSentence: I have (1) _________ such an interesting book.

questions.firstSentence: He's too proud to say sorry.
She was in the habit of going jogging before breakfast.
You'll only get a discount if you're a member.
questions.secondSentence: You'll get a discount (1) _________ a member.

questions.firstSentence: She asked him, 'What time did you arrive?'
